From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia
To test editing of Wikipedia, go to [Wikipedia:Sandbox](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipedia:Sandbox "Wikipedia:Sandbox").
[![Wiktionary logo](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/9/99/Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg/40px-Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg.png)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/File:Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg)
Look up _**[test](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/test "wiktionary:test")**_ , _**[testing](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/testing "wiktionary:testing")**_ , _**[Test](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/Test "wiktionary:Test")**_ , or _**[TEST](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/TEST "wiktionary:TEST")**_ in Wiktionary, the free dictionary.
**Test**(**s**), **testing** , or **TEST** may refer to: 
  * [Test (assessment)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Test_\(assessment\) "Test \(assessment\)"), an educational assessment intended to measure the respondents' knowledge or other abilities


## Arts and entertainment
  * [_Test_ (2013 film)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Test_\(2013_film\) "Test \(2013 film\)"), an American film
  * [_Test_ (2014 film)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Test_\(2014_film\) "Test \(2014 film\)"), a Russian film
  * [_Test_ (2025 film)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Test_\(2025_film\) "Test \(2025 film\)"), an Indian sports drama
  * [Test (group)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Test_\(group\) "Test \(group\)"), a jazz collective
  * [_Tests_ (album)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tests_\(album\) "Tests \(album\)"), a 1998 album by The Microphones
  * [_Testing_ (album)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Testing_\(album\) "Testing \(album\)"), an album by ASAP Rocky
  * ["Testing" (_Dilbert_)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Testing_\(Dilbert\) "Testing \(Dilbert\)"), a 1999 television episode
  * "Test", a song by Aitch featuring AJ Tracey from the album _[4](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/4_\(Aitch_album\) "4 \(Aitch album\)")_


## Computing
  * [.test](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/.test ".test"), a reserved top-level domain
  * [Software testing](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Software_testing "Software testing")
  * [test (Unix)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Test_\(Unix\) "Test \(Unix\)"), a Unix command for evaluating conditional expressions
  * [TEST (x86 instruction)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/TEST_\(x86_instruction\) "TEST \(x86 instruction\)"), an x86 assembly language instruction


## People
  * [Test (wrestler)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Test_\(wrestler\) "Test \(wrestler\)"), ring name for Andrew Martin (1975GÇô2009), Canadian professional wrestler
  * [John Test](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/John_Test "John Test") (1781GÇô1849), American politician
  * [Zack Test](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Zack_Test "Zack Test") (born 1989), American rugby union player


## Science and technology
  * [Experiment](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Experiment "Experiment"), a procedure carried out in order to test a hypothesis
  * [Statistical hypothesis test](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Statistical_hypothesis_test "Statistical hypothesis test"), techniques to reach conclusions about probabilistic behavior
  * [Metal testing](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Metal_testing "Metal testing")
  * [Mechanical testing](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mechanical_testing "Mechanical testing")
    * [Proof test](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Proof_test "Proof test"), a stress test to demonstrate the fitness of a load-bearing structure
  * [Product testing](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Product_testing "Product testing")
  * [Stress testing](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Stress_testing "Stress testing")
  * [System testing](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/System_testing "System testing")
  * [Test equipment](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Test_equipment "Test equipment")
  * [Test (biology)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Test_\(biology\) "Test \(biology\)"), the shell of sea urchins and certain microorganisms


## Sports
  * [Test cricket](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Test_cricket "Test cricket"), a series of matches played by two national representative teams
  * [Test match (rugby league)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Test_match_\(rugby_league\) "Test match \(rugby league\)"), a match between teams of the Rugby League International Federation
  * [Test match (rugby union)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Test_match_\(rugby_union\) "Test match \(rugby union\)"), an international match usually played between two senior national teams
  * [Test (greyhound competition)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Test_\(greyhound_competition\) "Test \(greyhound competition\)"), a greyhound race run between 1941 and 2008


## Other uses
  * [River Test](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/River_Test "River Test"), a river in England
  * [Test (law)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Test_\(law\) "Test \(law\)"), an applied method of evaluation used to resolve matters of jurisprudence


## Abbreviation
  * Test., abbreviation for **Testament** , referring to the [Old Testament](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Old_Testament "Old Testament") and [New Testament](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/New_Testament "New Testament") of the Christian Bible.
